The name of the boy in the story is Kunal.
Which city does Kunal belong to?\
Kunal belongs to Ahmedabad, which is a city in the state of Gujarat.
With whom was kunal talking to?

In the story, it is not explicitly mentioned with whom Kunal was talking, but it is mentioned that he used to sit by the river and listen to stories from his grandfather about the Chhota Lahore incident. So, it can be inferred that Kunal's grandfather was sharing his stories, rather than having a conversation.
